enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a life update from Boulder after a month-long gap since his last vlog, describing his ongoing work on a historical timeline project that links horizontal and vertical navigation, organizing thousands of Flickr photos of battles and castles by century, and plans to eventually start a Patreon. He also mentions feeling physically well (no asthma), receiving books from his mom, and trying to sell his van.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Wants to join once he has consistent output ready, prefers batching content factory-style first for efficiency
Strongly prefers doing everything in bulk/factory style at once rather than inconsistently over time
Excited about it but finds linking every king across horizontal and vertical navigation tedious and gets bored
Feels good when not having asthma attacks and intends to keep momentum as long as health allows

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder, V-Log. It's 6.10pm on October 20th, 2017. Last time I did a video, it was like, um, September 16th, so it was a month and four days ago.

So, time flew, but that's good things, means I'm working. Um, so what happened was, um, yeah, yeah, I was sober, and I was gonna, I think I was gonna start riding my bike in my room, but, uh, so yeah, my, what happened was my roommate gave me a joint three days in a row.
So, it's kind of activated my taste for reefer again, and then, uh, and then I bought some for 17 bucks, and I didn't even get that much, and then I ran out and I was like, oh, I need more.
So I got a whole ounce, and then I just got another ounce now. So, um, because, um, I had a look at my, uh, timeline. Yeah, yeah, because I just wanted to fix links on it.

Um, I just wanted to fix links on my timeline, because I feel I have more broken, somehow, even though I fixed the links a bunch of times. Um, and then, of course, since I was working on my timeline, for the first time since I moved here, uh, yeah, I just got hooked on it, and I wanted to do all this other stuff, like make it, um, so that when you click, you have the horizontal part of the timeline and then the vertical part,

And I wanted to have it so that when you click on the king of the horizontal part, it'll take you to the king of the vertical part, and then when you click on the king of the vertical part, it'll take you back up to the king of the horizontal part.
Um, and, uh, so I was working on that for a little bit, but to do that for every single king ever is time-consuming.
So I got kind of a little bit bored with that, and then I started doing, um, I think, yeah, with the picture, oh, yeah, making videos of, uh, tribes.
Yeah, and I have the idea of making videos of battles, but show every single soldier.
I already have my 40,000 people on Google Earth, um, that I made, and I might have to make more than that, but yeah, you just make screen captures of individual people,
And then you put their individual, you know, centuries in the place until it has the exact number of people, even up to 100,000 people.
So, I'm going to have 160,000 people in my room, but, or, in Boulder here, all standing together.
But, uh, yeah, so, and then I wanted to add, uh, Flickr pictures to, next to all of the kings, and, uh, that's going to be time-consuming.
And, uh, I just organized my Flickr yesterday, and I was, I hadn't looked at it forever, it was, I'd, like, never finished organizing it.
I uploaded 62 different folders, I mean, um, albums of castles, like yesterday, and named them and everything before I realized I already did that.
I already uploaded all of them, and I did, like, eight cathedrals, so I already did the castle and the cathedrals, I didn't even remember that.
Because I also went to, oh, because then, because then I started doing battles.
Um, I'm attaching all the photos that I have of battles to the location of the battles, and then attach that to my timeline.

And, uh, and then, and then the videos, too, of battles, but I made videos of, um, all the tribes of Gaul and Spain from a long time ago, and Italy, and, and, and, uh, yeah, but when I, well, fix that some more, but, yeah, yeah, so I'll eventually put all that on YouTube, but, like, daily YouTube.

And so, when I get around to doing daily YouTube videos, uh, I can get on, I'll get on Patreon, that's when I get on Patreon, because people ask, get on Patreon, ask for money, because they give, like, um, regular, uh, contribution of their work.
And so I could give regular videos of battles and kingdoms and on Google Earth, um, that'd be fun.
Um, so I'd like to at least do one fully, and then I can do others.
But I want to, um, collect all the stuff and get it up to speed so they don't have to do all of it, you know.

It's a lot more efficient if you do it all factory style all at once, because, uh, you do the whole thing faster and less chance of, uh, stuff going wrong, you know, doing it inconsistently and stuff.
So, I got through, um, how many battles were there?
I can't remember, but it was, like, 5,000 battles that I have on Flickr.
And, um, yeah, I did all of, uh, all 600, all from 600 to 1,400, and now, and then all of 1,400, 1,800.
Now I'm doing 1,800s, and that's, um, 1,300 pictures.
And then it's, like, 1,900 pictures for the 1,900s, and then it's, like, 270 pictures for the 2,000s, and so, um, it'll be interesting to see.
See, that's what I'm working on now.
And, uh, if I get bored with that, I might start uploading, um, doing it with, uh, castles.
I don't have the locations of the castles yet, so I have to put that still, um, yeah, so it's a lot of work, man.
Um, and I feel good physically.
I'm not, like, having asthma.
As soon as I start getting asthma every single night where I can't breathe at all at night,
And then I'm sleeping the whole next day, like, multiple days in a row, that's when I'll start riding my bike.
Um, I need to, I like to keep this going as long as I can because I'm making really good progress, you know.
I can, I'm looking at finishing the 1,800s where there's 1,300 pictures in, like, a couple of days if I can.
You know what I mean?
Like, I got through until here in just a few days, so you focus and you get it done.
That's why I didn't do the video.
I felt like I didn't have the time.
I've been, uh, helping my mom.
She gave me 75 bucks today.
Um, so that's cool.
Still trying to sell my van.
If anyone wants to buy it, we're going to sell it for $16.
It has a lot of nicks and stuff and dents and stuff.
People don't like nicks and dents, even though, but I also don't have the paperwork.
I lost the paperwork to prove what work I did on.
It's just weird.
Um, yeah, so that's it with that.
Okay, peace out.
